title: pelargonium × campyliiflorum
intro: Pelargonium × campyliiflorum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the combination of Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium tomentosum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and fungal infections. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve digestion, and soothe menstrual cramps.
